---
title: "Chip Brock"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: media/chip_c.jpeg
  #image-shape: round
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/raymond-brock-47261919/
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:brockr@msu.edu
---

I'm an experimental particle physicist at Michigan State University and have been privileged for 50 years to be supported by the U.S. public to do particle physics research. I'm grateful for that support and my way of paying you back is by teaching these subjects to non-science students and to now broaden my audience to you.
